hero.label: Peer-to-Peer File Sharing
hero.title: Share files <1>directly</1>. No cloud. No middleman.
hero.description: Mirall connects you and your team peer-to-peer. Create a space, invite collaborators, and share files that travel directly between devices — encrypted, instant, and completely serverless.

features.title: Built different
features.description: No accounts. No uploads to someone else's server. Mirall gives you a private space to share files the way it should work.

spaces.title: Shared Spaces
spaces.description: Create topic-based spaces for your team, project, or group. Everyone in a space sees all available files and chooses what to download.

p2p.title: True Peer-to-Peer
p2p.description: Files travel directly between devices over encrypted connections. No server ever touches your data.

encrypted.title: Encrypted by Default
encrypted.description: Every connection is end-to-end encrypted via Hyperswarm. No keys to manage — it just works.

inviteOnly.title: Invite-Only Access
inviteOnly.description: Share a simple invite code to add peers to a space. No accounts, no sign-ups, no permission dashboards.

explicitDownload.title: You Choose What to Keep
explicitDownload.description: See every file available in a space. Download only what you need — nothing syncs without your say-so.

zeroInfra.title: Zero Infrastructure
zeroInfra.description: No cloud storage fees. No server maintenance. Mirall runs on the Holepunch network — fully decentralized.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Three steps. No setup wizards, no admin panels, no billing pages.

items.title: Create a space
items.description: Name it, pick an icon, and you're live. Mirall generates a unique invite code you can share with anyone.

items.title: Invite your people
items.description: Send the invite code. Your peers paste it in and they're connected — directly to you, no server in between.

items.title: Share and download
items.description: Drop files into the space. Everyone sees what's available. Each person downloads exactly what they need.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Mirall.

items.question: Where are my files stored?
items.answer: On your device, and only your device. When you share a file, peers download it directly from you. There is no cloud server, no intermediary storage. Once someone downloads a file, they have their own local copy.

items.question: What happens when I'm offline?
items.answer: Files you've downloaded stay on your device — they're yours. Your peers can still see the file metadata, but they can't download files from you until you're back online. If another peer who has the same file is online, they can download from them instead.

items.question: Is it really encrypted?
items.answer: Yes. Every peer connection is end-to-end encrypted via Hyperswarm's noise protocol. No one — not even us — can see your files or metadata in transit. There's no central server that could be breached.

items.question: How do I invite someone to a space?
items.answer: When you create a space, Mirall generates an invite code. Share it however you like — chat, email, text. Your peer pastes it into the app and they're connected instantly.

items.question: Are there file size limits?
items.answer: No hard limits. Mirall streams files in chunks, so large files work fine. Transfer speed depends on your network connection and your peer's upload bandwidth.

items.question: Is Mirall free?
items.answer: Mirall is free to use for now, but we plan to charge for it in the future.

download.label: Download
download.title: Download Mirall
download.description: Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux. Pick your platform and start sharing files peer-to-peer in seconds.

cta.title: Your files. Your devices. No middleman.
cta.description: Join the movement that share files the way it should be — direct, encrypted, and free from cloud lock-in.

footer.tagline: Peer-to-peer file sharing for teams. No cloud, no accounts, no compromises.

support.title: Support
support.heading: Get help from inside the app
support.description: Mirall has built-in support. Click the "Send Feedback" button in the top right corner of the app to report issues, request features, or ask questions. Your message goes directly to our team.
support.screenshotAlt: Mirall app with the Send Feedback button highlighted

steps.title: How to reach us
items: Click the "Send Feedback" button in the top right corner
Hit send — we'll get back to you

support.note: No external ticketing system, no email chains. Everything stays in the app.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.heading: Getting started with Mirall
docs.intro: Mirall is a peer-to-peer file sharing app. No cloud, no accounts — just direct connections between you and your peers. This guide walks you through everything you need to know.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.description: When you first open Mirall, you'll be asked to set up a profile. Choose a display name and optionally upload an avatar. This is how your peers will see you in shared spaces.

spaces.title: Shared Spaces
spaces.description: Spaces are where file sharing happens. Each space is a private group where members can share and download files directly from each other.
spaces.screenshotAlt: Mirall Shared Spaces screen showing active spaces with members

creating.title: Creating a space
steps: Click "Create Space" in the top right
Give your space a name and pick an icon
Mirall generates an invite code — share it with anyone you want to join

joining.title: Joining a space
steps: Click "Join Space" in the top right
Paste the invite code you received
You're connected — files from other members will appear automatically

files.title: Sharing files
files.description: Inside a space, you'll see all files shared by every member. Files are not downloaded automatically — you see what's available and choose what to keep.

uploading.title: Adding files
uploading.description: Drag and drop files into the space, or click "Select Files" to pick them from your computer. Your files are shared immediately with all connected peers.

downloading.title: Downloading files
downloading.description: Click the download button on any file shared by a peer. The file transfers directly from their device to yours — no server involved. You'll see real-time progress with speed and ETA.

items.meaning: The file is on your device — either you uploaded it or you've downloaded it.
The file is available from a connected peer. Click download to get it.
The file is being transferred to your device right now.
The file exists in the space but the owner is currently offline.

peers.title: Peers and connections
peers.description: The sidebar in each space shows all members. A green dot means they're online and you can download their files. When a peer goes offline, their files show as unavailable until they reconnect.

inviting.title: Inviting peers
inviting.description: Click the invite button inside any space to copy the invite code. Send it to whoever you want to join — via chat, email, or any other way. They paste it in and they're connected.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Click the gear icon in the top right to access settings. From here you can:
settings.screenshotAlt: Mirall Settings screen showing profile, appearance, and general options
items: Change your display name and avatar
Switch between light and dark theme
View storage usage on your device
Check the app version and about info

privacy.title: Privacy and security
privacy.description: Mirall is built on the Holepunch network. Every connection between peers is end-to-end encrypted. Your files never pass through a server — they travel directly between devices. There are no accounts, no tracking, and no one can access your files except the peers you invite.

leaving.title: Leaving a space
leaving.description: To leave a space, open it and use the leave option. Mirall will cancel any active transfers, clean up peer data, and remove the space from your list. Files you've already downloaded stay on your device.
